'''rarasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ifoxetine|ifoxetine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ifoxetine|ifoxetine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rarasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræræsæth|ræræsæth]] || [[word:ræræsæj|ræræsæj]] || [[word:ræræsæsh|ræræsæsh]] || [[word:ræræsæ|ræræsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rararasath|rararasath]] || [[word:rararasaj|rararasaj]] || [[word:rararasash|rararasash]] || [[word:rararasa|rararasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarasath|rarasath]] || [[word:rarasaj|rarasaj]] || [[word:rarasash|rarasash]] || [[word:rarasa|rarasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarafsafth|rarafsafth]] || [[word:rarafsafj|rarafsafj]] || [[word:rarafsafsh|rarafsafsh]] || [[word:rarafsaf|rarafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarasatha|rarasatha]] || [[word:rarasaja|rarasaja]] || [[word:rarasasha|rarasasha]] || [[word:rarasaka|rarasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarasath|rarasath]] || [[word:rarasaj|rarasaj]] || [[word:rarasash|rarasash]] || [[word:rarasa|rarasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarasathal|rarasathal]] || [[word:rarasajal|rarasajal]] || [[word:rarasashal|rarasashal]] || [[word:rarasakal|rarasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarasaathatha|rarasaathatha]] || [[word:rarasaajaja|rarasaajaja]] || [[word:rarasaashasha|rarasaashasha]] || [[word:rarasaaka|rarasaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarasathan|rarasathan]] || [[word:rarasajan|rarasajan]] || [[word:rarasashan|rarasashan]] || [[word:rarasakan|rarasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarasathaoro|rarasathaoro]] || [[word:rarasajaoro|rarasajaoro]] || [[word:rarasashaoro|rarasashaoro]] || [[word:rarasakaoro|rarasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
